word: H1372 - גַּבַּחַת - gabbachath - gab-bakh'-ath - Bald forehead

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּבּחת

Transliteration: gabbachath

Phonetic: gab-bakh'-ath

BDB Definition:

  1. bald forehead, bald, a bare spot

Origin: from the same as H1371

TWOT entry: 306b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
